titleStmt.title: SII 15.119: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 119. (B.K. No. 30 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar to the right of the entrance into the Jain basti.

This is dated the 6th regnal year of the king, Nandana, Pushya-paurṇame, Monday, lunar eclipse, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, corresponding to 1173 A.D., January 1. The Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, however, did not occur on that day, but on the 25th of December, 1172 A.D.

The inscription describes the One Thousand Mahājanas of Mahāgrahāra Lokkiguṇḍi, an endowment of the illustrious Rāma, who are stated to have been protecting the religious works in conjunction with all the residents of the place.
It registers a gift of money made by Guṇanidhi Kēśava for the worship of the deity in the Basadi (Jain temple) of Balleya Jēmayya. A similar gift was made to the same deity by Āṇīkāṟa Nāgiseṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁccanaṁ . jīyātraiḷō
kyanāthasya sāsanaṁ jinasāsanaṁ . © svasti yamaniyama
svādhyāya dhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāna parāyaṇa
japasamādhiśīḷasaṁpanarssamasta guṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛta
viditavēdārtthavidyāpāragarṣaṭkarmmaniratarsaptasōmasaṁsthābhṛtāvagāhana pavi
trīkṛtaśarīrarccaturvvēda pāragaraṣṭādaśadharmmaśāstrakuśaḷarēkavākyaracaḷita
dhairyyardhairyyaparākramarāsṛta(śrita) janakaḷpavṛkṣarahitapakṣakṣaya
kararkkaliyugagāṁgēyarpparamaparōpakārigaḷāhavadhurandhararssā
pānugrahasamarttharkāryyabṛhaspatigaḷēkaikapaṇḍitargrāmanāmō
ttamarvvaiṣṇavagītimanōhararppāpabhīrugaḷparanārīdūrardduṣṭavidhvaṁsaka
rvviśiṣṭa janāśrayarkkāma^(1)^krōdhalōbhamōhavivarjjitardvātriṁśatsahasra
samayārgghyārhadvijakuḷatiḷakarśśaraṇāgata vajrapaṁjara śrīrāmaradatti
mahāgrahāra śrīmallokkiguṇḍiyūroḍeya pramukha mahāja
naṁ śrī sāsirvvaru samasta gōle gōbrāhmaṇarmmodalāgi sabālavvaddharnneredu dharmmaṁ
gaḷmaṁ sudharmmadiṁ rakṣitamāgi rakṣisuttamire . © Intu pogarttevetta śrī sāsirbbara
priyaputraṁ guṇanidhikēśavana puṇyaprabhāvameṁtendoḍe . śrīyanidhi sadguṇa
gaṇanidhi nayanidhi saujanyanidhi kaḻānidhi dhāvalyayaśōnidhi guṇanidhi kē
śavanudāranidhiyene negaḷdan . © . © Acaḷitavārppu pempacaḷitaṁ narasiṁ
ha padābjabhakti mattacaḷita yuktiyoḷvacaḻitaṁ nijalakṣmiyenalke dhā
triyiṁdacaḷita kēśavaṁ sale nimirccidanātmayaśa^(1)^ prakāśaman .
© svasti śrīmatkaḷacuryya bhujabaḻa cakravartti rāyamurāri sōyidēvavarṣada 6
neya nandana saṁvatsarada puṣyasuddha paurṇnamāse sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇamuttarāya
ṇa saṁkrānti vyatīpātaṁ kūḍida puṇyatithiyoḷtavanidhikēśavadēvaṁ tannaccina kēṇiyalli ballaya
jēmayyana basadiya dēvaraṣṭavidhārccanage Alliyācāryya śrī ṣuṣēna paṇḍitadēvare kālaṁ
karcci dhārāpūrvvakamāḍi nūṟippattu hoṁnacinna davaṭṭa gadyāṇa 3 ṟaṁ Ācaṁdrārkka tāraṁba
raṁ naḍevantāgi koṭṭaru . Ā puṇyatithiyoḻu Āṇikāṟa nāgiseṭṭiyaru tannāṇiya no
ṭṭa lli balleya jēmayyana basadiya dēvaraṣṭavidhārccanega Ali(lli)yācāryya paṇḍi
tadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi gadyāṇa 10 Ācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍevantāgi
koṭṭaru . yintī dharmmamanārōrvvarkkēṇikāṟaruṁ Āṇikāṟaruṁ taṁtammadharmma mendu ye
llā kālaṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . Ivanī yaṁdadeneyde rakṣisidavaṁgiṣṭārtthasaṁ saṁbha
vikuṁ pūṇdaḷidage gaṁge gaye kēdāra gurukṣētrameṁbivaṟoḻu pēsade pārvvara go
vara gōbṛṁdamaṁ striyaraṁ tave goṁdikkida pāpameydugumavaṁ bīḷguṁ nigō daṁgaḷoḷu .The next line is
Digital edition of SII 15.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
